experiences.title: Outdoor Advertising and Operations Consultant
experiences.description: OOH consultant to established media owner in Saudi Arabia from September 2013 until March 2014. The role was to oversee all production, printing and installation in Jeddah, Riyadh and Dammam plus consultancy and management of a new flagship product launched in Riyadh The role included the development and implementation of new systems, policies and procedures together with retraining of management and training of managers and workers in stock control, ordering, installation, Health and Safety procedures and budget control. Ongoing advice and consultancy to explore media assets and develop partnerships within the Middle East

experiences.title: National Director Of Operations
experiences.description: Overall responsibility for posting, installation and financial accountability in all national depots. The role involved implementing systems, internal coordination with other departments, organisation of staff and depots and liaison with creditors and debtors.

experiences.title: Partner
experiences.description: Partner in largest independent posting and installation  contractor in the UK

experiences.title: National Buying Manager
experiences.description: Responsible for the buying and accountability of all large format purchases for Poster Publicity Ltd. The role involved interaction on a national scale with media owners and local buying managers.

experiences.title: Buying Manager
experiences.description: Initially responsible for the purchase and accountability of advertising panels in the South London area, evolving into responsibility for the whole of London and the South East
